THUNDERSTORM WIND GUSTS OF 65 TO OVER 75 MPH WERE MEASURED IN THE BELLEVUE/OFFUTT AREA WITH A PEAK GUST OF 78 MPH RECORDED AT OFFUTT. THE STRONG WINDS DOWNED AT LEAST SEVERAL LARGE TREES AND TREE BRANCHES FROM SOUTH OMAHA INTO BELLEVUE AND PAPILLION WHICH KNOCKED THE POWER OUT TO AROUND 10000 HOMES.
